headline: Scotiabank Lifts Target on VICI Properties (VICI) as Net Lease REITs Show Strength
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 6.39%, VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE:VICI) is included among the 10 Best Dividend Stocks with 5%+ Yields and Growing Cash Flows. On May 12, Scotiabank analyst Greg McGinniss raised the firm’s price target on VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE:VICI) to $32 from $30 and maintained a Sector Perform rating on the shares. The […]
